description_en: All businesses operating in Montreal must obtain a municipal business permit. Additional zoning, signage, and construction permits may also apply depending on business type and location.
description_fr: Toutes les entreprises exploitées à Montréal doivent obtenir un permis d'exploitation municipal.

zoning.description_en: Business use must comply with the borough's urban plan and zoning bylaws. Verify permitted uses before signing a lease.
zoning.note_en: Home-based businesses may have restrictions on signage, client visits, and noise

restrictions_en: No retail sales to the general public from the home
Business use must remain secondary to residential use
